data.name: Settings_BackupDestHint
data.value: Backup copies of your files are saved into this folder. If possible, choose a different drive from the originals.

data.name: Settings_ProtectedFoldersHint
data.value: One folder per line - you can type and edit paths directly. Everything inside (subfolders included) is backed up automatically.

data.name: Settings_TimingHint
data.value: The defaults work well for most users. Hover over an item to see what it does.

data.name: Settings_RetentionHint
data.value: Limits how much backup history is kept; old backups are cleaned up automatically in the background. Leave all at 0 to keep everything forever.

data.name: Settings_Tip_BackupDir
data.value: Folder where backup copies are stored. Environment variables such as %USERPROFILE% can be used. Default: %USERPROFILE%\FileHistoryCloneBackup

data.name: Settings_Tip_IncludeList
data.value: Folders to watch and back up (subfolders included), one per line. Type or edit paths directly, or pick a folder with the Add button. Add at least one folder you want to protect, e.g. Documents.

data.name: Settings_Tip_Exclude
data.value: Files and folders matching any pattern here are not backed up. Wildcards * and ? can be used (e.g. *.tmp, node_modules). Start a line with ! to make an exception (always back up), or with # for a comment.

data.name: Settings_Tip_DefaultInterval
data.value: Even if a file changes many times, it is backed up at most once per this many seconds. Smaller = more versions kept, more disk space used. Default: 3600 (1 hour)

data.name: Settings_Tip_IdleTimer
data.value: The full folder scan (crawling) runs only while you are away from the PC. It starts after there has been no mouse/keyboard input for this many seconds. Default: 600 (10 minutes)

data.name: Settings_Tip_CrawlInterval
data.value: After a full scan of all folders finishes, wait this many seconds before starting the next one. Default: 86400 (1 day)

data.name: Settings_Tip_MaxGenerations
data.value: Number of past versions kept per file; older versions beyond this are deleted. 0 = keep all versions. Default: 0

data.name: Settings_Tip_RetentionDays
data.value: Backups older than this many days are deleted. 0 = never delete by age. Default: 0

data.name: Settings_Tip_Language
data.value: Language of the app's windows and menus. Applied the next time FileHistoryClone starts.

data.name: Settings_PerFolderHint
data.value: Set a custom minimum backup interval (seconds) per protected folder. Leave blank to use the default value.

data.name: Settings_PerFolderInvalid
data.value: The interval must be blank or a number of 0 or more.

data.name: Settings_Tip_PerFolder
data.value: Override the backup interval for specific protected folders. Folders without a custom value use the default on the left.

data.name: Cleanup_TemporaryNote
data.value: This cleanup is a one-time operation. To keep backup size down permanently, set the retention policy (max generations / retention days) in the Settings window.

data.name: Settings_DefaultInterval
data.value: Min. seconds between backups of a file:

data.name: Settings_NeedBackupDir
data.value: Please choose a folder to store backups.

data.name: Settings_NeedIncludeDir
data.value: Please add at least one folder to protect.

data.name: Settings_RestartPrompt
data.value: Settings saved. Restart FileHistoryClone now to apply the changes?

data.name: MainForm_OverwriteFile
data.value: The file already exists. Overwrite it?

data.name: MainForm_OverwriteDirectory
data.value: The directory already exists. Overwrite it?

data.name: Cleanup_ModeKeepAllLatest
data.value: Keep only the latest version of all files

data.name: Cleanup_ModeKeepExistingLatest
data.value: Keep only the latest version of existing files
